xceed.description: Xceed public nightlife and live-entertainment event reference data. Contains scheduled event metadata including venue information. Emitted at bridge startup and refreshed periodically.

xceed.Event.name: Event
xceed.Event.description: Metadata for a scheduled nightlife or live-entertainment event as published by the Xceed Open Event API. Includes event identity, schedule, venue, and external sales link. Emitted as reference data at startup and on each refresh cycle.

type.name: type
type.description: CloudEvents type identifier for an Xceed event record

source.name: source
source.description: Base URL of the Xceed Open Event API feed

subject.name: subject
subject.description: Unique UUID identifier of the Xceed event, matching the Kafka key

xceed.admissions.description: Xceed admission and ticket-availability telemetry. Contains real-time sales state signals such as isSoldOut and isSalesClosed for each admission tier of an event. Emitted each polling cycle.

xceed.EventAdmission.name: EventAdmission
xceed.EventAdmission.description: Ticket-availability snapshot for a single admission tier of an Xceed event, retrieved from the /events/:eventId/admissions endpoint of the Xceed Open Event API. Captures sales state signals including isSoldOut, isSalesClosed, current price, and remaining ticket count.

type.name: type
type.description: CloudEvents type identifier for an Xceed admission record

source.name: source
source.description: Base URL of the Xceed Open Event API feed

subject.name: subject
subject.description: Composite identifier consisting of the parent event UUID and the admission tier UUID, separated by a slash, matching the Kafka key

schema.name: Event
schema.description: Scheduled nightlife or live-entertainment event record as published by the Xceed Open Event API v1 /events endpoint. Xceed is a European nightlife and ticketing platform covering clubs, bars, parties, and festivals. Each event has a stable UUID assigned by Xceed, a human-readable slug, schedule timestamps, a cover image, an optional external ticket sales link, and an embedded venue object describing the physical location.

event_id.description: Stable UUID assigned by Xceed to uniquely identify this event across all API versions. Returned as the 'id' field in the /events response. Used as the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

legacy_id.description: Legacy numeric integer identifier for the event from an earlier Xceed system version. Returned as 'legacyId' in the /events response. May be null for events that were created natively in the current UUID-based system.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the event as entered by the event organiser on the Xceed platform. Examples: 'Techno Warehouse Party', 'Club Night with DJ X', 'Summer Festival Opening'. Returned as 'name' in the /events response.

slug.description: URL-friendly string identifier for the event, derived from the event name and suitable for use in Xceed web URLs. Returned as 'slug' in the /events response. Example: 'techno-warehouse-party-2024'. May be null for draft or unlisted events.

starting_time.description: Scheduled start time of the event expressed as a UTC datetime. Derived from the 'startingTime' UNIX epoch seconds integer in the /events response. Represents when the event doors open or the event officially begins.

ending_time.description: Scheduled end time of the event expressed as a UTC datetime. Derived from the 'endingTime' UNIX epoch seconds integer in the /events response. May be null if the organiser has not specified an end time.

cover_url.description: HTTPS URL pointing to the event's main banner or cover image hosted on the Xceed CDN. Returned as 'coverUrl' in the /events response. Suitable for display in listings and detail views. May be null if no image has been uploaded.

external_sales_url.description: HTTPS URL pointing to an external ticket vendor or the event organiser's own sales page, when tickets are not sold directly through the Xceed platform. Returned as 'externalSalesUrl' in the /events response. Null when tickets are sold via Xceed admissions.

venue_id.description: UUID assigned by Xceed to uniquely identify the venue where this event takes place. Extracted from the nested 'venue.id' field in the /events response. Null if venue information is not available for this event.

venue_name.description: Display name of the venue as listed on the Xceed platform. Extracted from 'venue.name' in the /events response. Examples: 'Berghain', 'Fabric', 'Pacha Barcelona'. Null if venue information is not attached to this event.

venue_city.description: City in which the venue is located, as stored in the Xceed venue record. Extracted from 'venue.city' or 'venue.location.city' in the /events response. Null if venue or city information is unavailable.

venue_country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code indicating the country where the venue is located. Extracted from 'venue.countryCode' or the venue location object in the /events response. Examples: 'DE', 'GB', 'ES', 'FR'. Null if country information is unavailable.

schema.name: EventAdmission
schema.description: Ticket-availability snapshot for a single admission tier of an Xceed event, retrieved from the GET /events/:eventId/admissions endpoint of the Xceed Open Event API v1. An event may offer multiple admission tiers (e.g. early-bird, standard, VIP). Each tier has a stable UUID and carries sales-state signals including whether tickets are sold out or whether sales have been closed, as well as price and remaining quantity.

event_id.description: UUID of the parent Xceed event that this admission tier belongs to. Matches the 'event_id' field in the corresponding xceed.Event record and the first segment of the Kafka key.

admission_id.description: Stable UUID assigned by Xceed to uniquely identify this admission tier within its parent event. Returned as the 'id' field in the /events/:eventId/admissions response. Forms the second segment of the composite Kafka key '{event_id}/{admission_id}'.

name.description: Human-readable label for this admission tier as set by the event organiser. Examples: 'Early Bird', 'General Admission', 'VIP Access', 'Guest List'. Returned as 'name' in the /events/:eventId/admissions response. May be null if the tier has no label.

is_sold_out.description: Boolean flag indicating whether all available tickets for this admission tier have been sold. Returned as 'isSoldOut' in the /events/:eventId/admissions response. True means no tickets are available for purchase; false means tickets are still available. Null if the field is not present in the response.

is_sales_closed.description: Boolean flag indicating whether ticket sales for this admission tier have been closed, either because the event has started, the sales window has expired, or the organiser has manually closed sales. Returned as 'isSalesClosed' in the /events/:eventId/admissions response. Null if the field is not present in the response.

price.description: Ticket price for this admission tier in the currency specified by the 'currency' field. Returned as 'price' in the /events/:eventId/admissions response. May be null for free events, guest-list admissions, or when pricing information is not exposed through the public API.

currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code indicating the currency in which the 'price' field is denominated. Examples: 'EUR', 'GBP'. Null when price is null or when currency information is not provided by the API.

remaining.description: Number of tickets remaining for this admission tier at the time the API was polled. Returned as 'remaining' in the /events/:eventId/admissions response. Null when remaining quantity is not tracked or not exposed through the public API. A value of 0 typically accompanies isSoldOut=true.
